    mp4Support(CreateMediaRequestMp4Support mp4Support)
    "capped_4k": Generates an mp4 video file up to 4k resolution "audioOnly": Generates an m4a audio file of the media file "audioOnly,capped_4k": Generates both video and audio media files for offline viewing

  • Method Details

    • inputs

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder inputs(@Nonnull List<Input> inputs)
      Add one input object at a time. For example, first add a **VideoInput** object. If you also need a watermark, click **Add item** again and select **WatermarkInput**.

      Repeat this process for **AudioInput** or **SubtitleInput** as needed. For a complete explanation of how media uploads from URL and processing work, refer to the FastPix Video on Demand Overview.

    • metadata

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder metadata(@Nullable Map<String,String> metadata)
      You can search for videos with specific key value pairs using metadata, when you tag a video in "key" : "value" pairs. Dynamic metadata allows you to define a key that allows any value pair. You can have maximum of 255 characters and upto 10 entries are allowed.

    • drmConfigurationId

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder drmConfigurationId(@Nullable String drmConfigurationId)
      UUID of the DRM configuration to be used

    • title

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder title(@Nullable String title)
      Title of the media file.

    • creatorId

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder creatorId(@Nullable String creatorId)
      The unique identifier of the user who created this media.

    • subtitles

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder subtitles(@Nullable Subtitles subtitles)
      Generates subtitle files for audio/video files.

    • accessPolicy

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder accessPolicy(@Nullable CreateMediaRequestAccessPolicy accessPolicy)
      Determines whether access to the streamed content is kept private or available to all.

    • mp4Support

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder mp4Support(@Nullable CreateMediaRequestMp4Support mp4Support)
      "capped_4k": Generates an mp4 video file up to 4k resolution "audioOnly": Generates an m4a audio file of the media file "audioOnly,capped_4k": Generates both video and audio media files for offline viewing

    • sourceAccess

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder sourceAccess(@Nullable Boolean sourceAccess)
      The sourceAccess parameter determines whether the original media file is accessible. Set to true to enable access or false to restrict it

    • optimizeAudio

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder optimizeAudio(@Nullable Boolean optimizeAudio)
      normalize volume of the audio track. This is available for pre-recorded content only.

    • maxResolution

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder maxResolution(@Nullable CreateMediaRequestMaxResolution maxResolution)
      The maximum resolution tier defines the highest quality at which your media is available.

    • mediaQuality

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder mediaQuality(@Nullable CreateMediaRequestMediaQuality mediaQuality)
      The quality tier applied to the media.

    • summary

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder summary(@Nullable Summary summary)

    • chapters

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder chapters(@Nullable Boolean chapters)
      Enable or disable the chapters feature for the media. Set to `true` to enable chapters or `false` to disable.

    • namedEntities

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder namedEntities(@Nullable Boolean namedEntities)
      Enable or disable named entity extraction. Set to `true` to enable or `false` to disable.

    • moderation

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder moderation(@Nullable Moderation moderation)

    • accessRestrictions

      public CreateMediaRequest.Builder accessRestrictions(@Nullable CreateMediaRequestAccessRestrictions accessRestrictions)

    • build

      public CreateMediaRequest build()
